nodes.name: Model prediction
nodes.description: ESOL solubility via mat-gram (SMI-TED) on this host's MAX serve

nodes.name: Predict
nodes.description: SMI-TED ESOL property prediction via mat-gram POST /embeddings (wraps local MAX)
instruction: Send JSON body with smiles set to a SMILES string or list of SMILES (e.g. "CCO" or ["CCO", "c1ccccc1"]).
Prefer when the user asks to predict solubility, ESOL, logS, embeddings, or numeric property values for SMILES.
Service runs task=esol (property mode) against MAX on this host.
Response includes mode, task, model path, embeddings, and predictions (log10 mol/L).

nodes.name: Screening candidates
nodes.description: ZINC lead-like + PubChem compound databases via SQL twins on this host's Postgres

nodes.name: Query
nodes.description: Natural-language SQL over zinc_leadlike (query_zinc_leadlike) and pubchem_compounds (query_pubchem_compounds)
instruction: Forward the user message verbatim under message (keep any twin/query prefix).

Prefer when the user asks about ZINC or PubChem molecules, lead-like screening, MW/logP/XLogP ranges, ZINC IDs, PubChem CIDs, InChIKeys, formulas, IUPAC names, tranches, TPSA, H-bonds, or SMILES search.
Do not use this for solubility prediction — that is solubility_embeddings.

Twins: query_zinc_leadlike (zinc_id, inchikey, tranche_name, smiles_pattern, mwt_min/max, logp_min/max, net_charge, limit) and query_pubchem_compounds (cid, inchikey, molecular_formula, smiles_pattern, iupac_name_pattern, molecular_weight_min/max, xlogp3_min/max, tpsa_min/max, hbond_donor, hbond_acceptor, total_charge, limit). Null unused filters.
Service selects a SQL twin via explicit name or EmbeddingGemma + LanceDB, extracts params with Lisette, and queries Postgres on this host.
JSON response includes twin_name, row_count, rows, and optional excel (base64) when include_excel is true.
If the user explicitly wants a downloadable spreadsheet, set response_format=excel_file instead of json.

nodes.name: Capabilities
nodes.description: Describe matching ZINC/PubChem SQL twins (query_zinc_leadlike, query_pubchem_compounds) and their required parameters (no DB execution)
instruction: Forward the user message verbatim under message.
Prefer when the user asks what screening query params are required or what twins/filters are available for ZINC or PubChem.
Returns matching twin names, descriptions, and required parameters.
